title: Submodule port var not updated when module is not inlined

features.name: output port with no_inline_module pragma
features.description: Code should include a submodule with output port that uses verilator no_inline_module pragma to prevent inlining

features.name: port aliasing via instantiation connection
features.description: Code should include an output port connected to parent signal through instantiation where aliasing between parent signal and port variable must occur

features.name: cross-module signal assertion in non-inlined module
features.description: Code should include an assertion checking a submodule port value where the parent signal is assigned before the assertion and module inlining is disabled

features.name: submodule port variable aliasing in stl_sequent phase
features.description: Code should include alias assignment generated in stl_sequent phase that fails to propagate parent signal changes to non-inlined submodule port
